message:
feat(dedup): implement personalization logic for skill adaptation

Enhance Personalizer::personalize() with actual adaptation logic:
- Convert naming conventions in code blocks (snake_case to camelCase)
- Skip conversion for idiomatic snake_case languages (Rust, Python)
- Preserve string contents during identifier conversion
- Apply terminology abbreviations based on user preferences

Add 5 new unit tests for personalization:
- snake_to_camel conversion
- adapt_code_examples with JavaScript blocks
- skip adaptation for Rust/Python code
- should_personalize detection
- abbreviation substitution

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
